title: dalbergia ovata var. obtusifolia
intro: Dalbergia ovata var. obtusifolia, also known as the obtusifolia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to India and Sri Lanka. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dalbergia ovata var. obtusifolia include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
